title: Tokyu 3000 Series | 東急3000系
description: Tokyu 3000 series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Tokyu 3000 series is a narrow-gauge electric multiple unit operating on the Tokyu Corporation railway network in Tokyo, Japan. Introduced in 1999 initially as six-car sets, they were lengthened to 8 cars between 2022 and 2023 in preparation for Sotetsu Railway through services via the Tokyu Shin-Yokohama Line.

This resource pack adds this train to Minecraft Transit Railway as a retexture of the default Eidan (Tokyo Metro) 9000 series train.

Both standard-length and mini versions of the train are provided.
